name: Chicken Cordon Bleu
recipeIngredient: 4 Whole Chicken Breasts, Ground Black Pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the deep fryer or oven to 375 degrees.
2. Place deboned chicken breasts between two sheets of waxed paper or plastic wrap.
3. Flatten the breasts using a meat mallet.
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
5. Combine chives, parsley, and tarragon in a bowl.
6. Shred the ham slices.
7. Dice the Swiss cheese slices.
8. Add shredded ham, diced Swiss cheese, and first measure of bread crumbs to the bowl.
9. Mix thoroughly.
10. Divide stuffing mixture evenly between chicken breasts.
11. Fold breasts over (taco style) and secure with toothpicks.
12. Beat egg in a wide, flat pan.
13. Place flour and second measure of bread crumbs in shallow pans.
14. Roll stuffed breasts in flour.
15. Dip breasts in beaten egg.
16. Coat breasts with second measure of bread crumbs.
17. Deep fry until golden (if baking, bake for 1 hour in a lightly greased dish).
18. Remove toothpicks and serve hot.
